extortion.description: https://thinredline.com.cn/ https://www.bloomberg.com/profile/company/2206935D:CH https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/thin-red-line Beijing Thin Red Line Technology is a hardware and software startup founded by Luo Yonghao, initially focused on Augmented Reality (AR) but now expanding into Artificial Intelligence (AI) and AI-native hardware. The company is developing an AI Operating System (AIOS) and software like the "Jarvis" AI assistant for screenless, voice-interactive devices and digit.
